class.name: UtilityAIBTRunNQSQuery
class.description: The [UtilityAIBTRunNQSQuery] node can be used to initialite Node Query System queries. They return [code]running[/code] until the query has completed.

members.member: A node reference to a [UtilityAINQSSearchSpaces] node. (Changed from v1.4 node path).
The number of results the search should return. Overrides the setting on the search space.
